_doc: Pinned final_model_id -> vendor FAMILY table for proof-of-operation (verifiable-compose Epic B, RFC #57). FAMILY = vendor, NOT tier: claude-opus + claude-sonnet are BOTH the 'anthropic' family (one family), so min_model_families:2 demands genuine cross-vendor diversity, not opus+sonnet (Flatline B6/B7). Source of truth: .claude/defaults/model-config.yaml provider sections. Drift-guarded by tests/integration/compose-proof.bats [B7]. An id absent from this map resolves to null and CANNOT satisfy a family slot (sprint-4 SB6 fail-closed).
